items.span_text: We used the Adam optimizer [20] with $\beta _ { 1 } = 0 . 9 , \beta _ { 2 } = 0 . 9 8$ and $\epsilon = 1 0 ^ { - 9 }$ . We varied the learning rate over the course of training, according to the formula:
items.title: Attention Is All You Need

final_answer.markdown:
The original Transformer paper ("Attention Is All You Need", Vaswani et al., 2017) used the Adam optimizer with the following hyperparameters in §5.3 Optimizer:

- **β₁ = 0.9**
- **β₂ = 0.98**
- **ε = 10⁻⁹**

Notably, β₂ was set higher than the default 0.999 typically used in Adam.[1]

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7

locations.preview: Label Smoothing During training, we employed label smoothing of value $\epsilon _ { l s } = 0 . 1 [ 3 6 ]$ . This hurts perplexity, as the model learns to be more unsure, but improves accuracy and BLEU score.
locations.title: Attention Is All You Need
